scope.notes: Clear question, 6 experiments (E1-E6), novel framing with identifiability + implicit regularization.

literature.notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro v2 + 6 new refs added to .bib: Pillow GLM, transfer entropy, Price theorem, Stein. Related work now cites GLM/TE as alternative approaches.

theory.notes: GPT-5.4 verified. Price theorem, identifiability, oracle proof all in paper. E6 experimentally confirms no crossover — approx always wins for tanh.

experiment.notes: 6 experiments complete. E6 oracle crossover: approx beats oracle at ALL stim levels (1.6x at σ=0 to 5.3x at σ=5). E2/E5 re-run with correlation + oracle baselines.

analyze.notes: 7 composite figures with Tol palette, CI shading, schematics, panel labels. F2/F6 regenerated with new baselines.

write.notes: Oracle crossover paragraph added to Discussion. GLM/TE refs in Related Work. Price/Stein cited. Rich captions. Appendix with 3 derivation sections.

review.notes: Remaining gaps: (1) only 10-15 reps per condition (ideally 50+), (2) no real C. elegans data, (3) chance baseline still weak — correlation baseline added but its constant value across fractions is suspicious.
